sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 3g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, you want the carbs to behave, not just show up.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 3g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, you want the carbs to behave, not just show up.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 81.5g. glycemic impact is a big part of the story. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 81.5g. glycemic impact is a big part of the story. for grains, the real question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 7g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 7g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to stay under control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 13% DV, iron at 7% DV, zinc at 8% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 13% DV, iron at 7% DV, zinc at 8% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. portable and convenient because very easy to use as a quick snack base. easy to portion and carry because simple packaging advantage. works with many toppings because practical flexibility for snack content.

displayItems.title: portable and convenient
displayItems.explanation: Very easy to use as a quick snack base.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first. portable and convenient because very easy to use as a quick snack base. easy to portion and carry because simple packaging advantage. works with many toppings because practical flexibility for snack content.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. weak grain-category payoff because very poor fibre/GI combination compared with stronger grains. glycemic impact is harsh because the GI behaviour is a major category problem. not very filling for the calories because can be unsatisfying unless built up with other foods.

closing.summary: Rice Cakes stands out for portable and convenient and easy to portion and carry. but it also gets held back by weak grain-category payoff and glycemic impact is harsh. Best only as a light snack base or texture food, not as a strong staple by itself.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only as a light snack base or texture food, not as a strong staple by itself.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
